entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The cultivated legume crop targeted for resistance improvement.

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The legume pod borer pest that attacks pigeonpea.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or repel attack by a pest.

entities.name: ANTIXENOSIS
entities.description: A component of resistance where the plant is non-preferred by the pest for oviposition.

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS
entities.description: A component of resistance that adversely affects the survival or development of the pest.

entities.name: OVIPOSITION NON-PREFERENCE
entities.description: The tendency of a pest to avoid laying eggs on a specific plant.

entities.name: CAJANUS ACUTIFOLIUS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea showing high levels of antixenosis and antibiosis.

entities.name: CAJANUS ALBICANS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea showing high levels of antixenosis and antibiosis.

entities.name: CAJANUS SERICEUS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea showing high levels of antixenosis and antibiosis.

entities.name: CAJANUS PLATYCARPUS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea showing high levels of antixenosis and antibiosis.

entities.name: CAJANUS SCARABAEOIDES
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea showing high levels of antixenosis and antibiosis.

entities.name: PARACALYX SCARIOSA
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea showing high levels of antixenosis and antibiosis.

entities.name: RHYNCHOSIA AUREA
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea showing high levels of antixenosis and antibiosis.

entities.name: CAJANUS CAJANIFOLIUS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea showing high levels of antibiosis.

entities.name: CAJANUS LINEATUS
entities.description: A wild relative of pigeonpea showing high levels of antibiosis.

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL DIET
entities.description: A method using lyophilized leaf or pod powder to assess antibiosis.

entities.name: POST-EMBRYONIC DEVELOPMENT PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of insect development from embryo to adult.

entities.name: NO-CHOICE CONDITION
entities.description: A testing environment where the pest has only one plant option for oviposition.

entities.name: DUAL-CHOICE CONDITION
entities.description: A testing environment where the pest chooses between two plant options for oviposition.

entities.name: MULTI-CHOICE CONDITION
entities.description: A testing environment where the pest chooses among multiple plant options for oviposition.

entities.name: RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Genetic elements from wild relatives to be introgressed into cultivated pigeonpea.

relationships.description: has its period prolonged by resistant plants
